description_long: This is a round, wide-mouthed plant pot with a slightly flared rim and a textured, embossed exterior. The pot is primarily a sandy beige color with subtle greenish and reddish tinges near the rim, giving it an earthy, weathered appearance. Decorative patterns, possibly floral or leaf motifs, are etched around the body, adding visual interest and a handcrafted feel. The interior is hollow and appears to be unfinished, with the same earthy tones as the exterior. The pot's base is relatively flat, allowing it to sit stably on flat surfaces. Its size and robust construction suggest it is suitable for medium-sized plants and can be used in outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A round, beige plant pot with embossed decorative patterns and a wide, open mouth. Earthy tones and a handcrafted texture make it suitable for medium plants.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide opening, flared rim, and detailed embossed patterns on the exterior.
description_view_1: Angled view highlights the pot's depth, the curvature of the body, and the subtle color variations near the rim.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full width of the opening and the pot's hollow interior, with visible rim wear.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizes the rounded shape and the continuity of the decorative patterns around the pot.
attribute_placement_context: commonly placed along sidewalks or in public parks for decorative planting
